summary: Consequence Transparency Panel feature fully tested. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: ConsequencePanel renders on profile page showing status (At Risk), multiplier (0.70x in red), meaning text, and actionable next_step guidance. All data-testid attributes working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/position/{user_id} correctly returns consequence_panel object with meaning and next_step fields
consequence_panel.meaning varies by status: atRisk mentions 'reduced visibility', rising mentions 'visibility boost'
consequence_panel.next_step provides actionable guidance specific to current status
At Risk with risk signals: meaning='Your public actions have significantly reduced visibility due to active risk signals.'
At Risk with inactivity: meaning='Your public actions have significantly reduced visibility due to extended inactivity.'
Rising status: meaning='Your public actions are getting a visibility boost.'
ConsequencePanel component renders on profile page with data-testid='consequence-panel'
Panel header displays 'ACTION VISIBILITY' with eye icon
Status row shows status label (At Risk) with pill badge using --status-color CSS variable
Multiplier row shows Nx format (e.g., 0.70x) - RED when reduced (<1.0), GREEN when boosted (>1.0)
Next step paragraph displays in cyan color with actionable guidance
CSS uses color-mix() for status pill styling with proper contrast
Feed still loads with rank_score sorting (regression passed)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (ConsequencePanel and all elements verified via browser automation)

test_credentials.user_1: newuser@test.com / password123 / user_id=05d47b99-88f1-44b3-a879-6c995634eaa0 (At Risk, active risk signals, 0.70x multiplier)
test_credentials.user_2: trust_fragile@test.com / password123 / user_id=0c98a493-3148-4c72-88e7-662baa393d11 (At Risk, active risk signals)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users with active risk signals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Consequence Transparency Panel fully implemented and tested on profile page. Key features: 1) Panel displays status, visibility multiplier (Nx format), meaning, and next_step. 2) consequence_panel data comes from GET /api/position/{user_id} endpoint. 3) Multiplier color: red when <1.0 (mult-reduced class), green when >1.0 (mult-boosted class). 4) Meaning varies by status type and whether risk signals are active. 5) Panel header is 'ACTION VISIBILITY' with eye icon. 6) All data-testid attributes working: consequence-panel, consequence-status-value, consequence-multiplier-value, consequence-meaning, consequence-next-step. Test user newuser@test.com has At Risk status with 0.70x multiplier.
